sutta:
wherever ananda says there are 4 ways to attain arahan hudla only 4 ways the first 1 is to practice samatha first followed by vipassana the second is vipassana first followed by samatha the third is amata and vipassana at the same time the fourth is contemplation of the cell and that leads to 1 pointedness of mind and and that leads to attainment of arahan hood from further contemplation so you find that all these ways has both the elements of samatha as well as vipassana


===== SOURCE: 029_Anguttara Nikaya Book 4G 41094 - 412111 by Bhante Hye Dhammavuddho Mahathera.txt =====
now we come to the next utah this 1 is about the same
